name: Hablando Huevadas
overview: It is a popular Peruvian comedy show that is broadcast in podcast and video format. Created by comedians José Luis García and Ricardo Pérez, the show is characterized by its irreverent style and acidic humor.

trailers.title: “La TV aun no tiene la plata para pagar lo que queremos cobrar”- Hablando Huevadas Ep.85 La Linares
